meta.purpose: Booking contacts and gatekeepers for transformational festival circuit
meta.note: Web access unavailable - data based on publicly known information. Verify current contacts before outreach.

festivals.name: Waking Life Festival

booking_info.music_booking: RESEARCH NEEDED - typically opens Dec/Jan for summer festival
booking_info.decision_makers: RESEARCH NEEDED - curated by artistic collective

festivals.why_perfect_fit: Transformational festival focused on consciousness + creativity. RAV Vast meditation sets ideal for healing area. Live looping + journey format matches festival ethos.
festivals.approach_strategy: Apply for healing/workshop area first. Emphasize journey narrative (busking to GGT to residency). Sound healing credentials key.
festivals.recommended_video: Who Is Flutur (2:52) - story arc matches transformational ethos

festivals.name: Boom Festival - Liminal Village

booking_info.music_booking: Different curators for each stage - Liminal Village has dedicated team
booking_info.deadline_typical: Applications typically open ~6-8 months before festival
booking_info.decision_makers: Liminal Village: dedicated healing/workshop programming team

stages_relevant.name: Liminal Village
stages_relevant.style: Healing arts, sound healing, workshops, transformational practices
stages_relevant.notes: PERFECT for RAV Vast meditation sets and sound healing

stages_relevant.name: Chillout Gardens
stages_relevant.notes: Good for sunset live looping sets

festivals.why_perfect_fit: Liminal Village is THE premier healing/transformational space at Boom. RAV Vast sound healing sessions, meditation journeys, and workshops all fit perfectly. Biennial festival means more exclusive but higher impact.
festivals.approach_strategy: Focus application SPECIFICALLY on Liminal Village, NOT main dance stages. Emphasize: sound healing experience, meditation facilitation, workshop capacity. Include vibroacoustic therapy software background as unique angle.
festivals.recommended_video: Efthymia (meditation focus) for healing area application
festivals.notes: 2026 is next edition. Start application process late 2025 / early 2026.

festivals.name: Evolve Festival

booking_info.deadline_typical: RESEARCH NEEDED - typically winter for summer festival

festivals.why_perfect_fit: German conscious scene is strong. Berlin connection valuable for European circuit. Smaller scale = better chance of acceptance for emerging artists.
festivals.approach_strategy: Position as 'sunset ceremony creator' with both music performance and workshop capability. German market appreciates technical skill (live looping) + spiritual depth.

festivals.name: BaliSpirit Festival

booking_info.decision_makers: Programming committee reviews all presenter/musician applications

stages_relevant.name: Night Stage
stages_relevant.style: World music, ecstatic dance, live performances

festivals.why_perfect_fit: Premier yoga festival in Asia. Sound healing is CORE to their programming. RAV Vast meditation sets perfect for multiple stages. Workshop potential (RAV Vast intro, sound meditation).
festivals.approach_strategy: Apply as both: 1) Sound healing practitioner for Dharma stage, 2) Musical performer for Spirit/Night stages. Mention: Villa Porta meditation residency, vibroacoustic therapy background. Festival values 'journey' narrative.
festivals.recommended_video: Efthymia for yoga/healing stages, Rocca di Arona for evening performances
festivals.notes: Highly competitive - apply early. Asia expansion valuable for touring circuit.

festivals.name: Pangonia Handpan Festival

booking_info.music_booking: RESEARCH NEEDED - likely direct contact via website/email
booking_info.decision_makers: RESEARCH NEEDED - likely small organizing team

festivals.why_perfect_fit: Dedicated handpan/steel tongue drum festival. RAV Vast endorsed artist = credibility in this community. Live looping with RAV Vast is unique angle. Workshop potential for RAV Vast techniques.
festivals.approach_strategy: Lead with RAV Vast endorsement. Propose both: 1) Performance showcase of RAV Vast + live looping integration, 2) Workshop on live looping with steel tongue drums. This community values technique + innovation.
festivals.recommended_video: Efthymia (RAV solo showcase) or technical looping video
festivals.notes: Niche festival but EXCELLENT for building credibility in handpan/RAV community. Good networking for handpan festival circuit.

conscious_european.name: Ozora Festival (Dragon Nest stage)
conscious_european.notes: Dragon Nest = chill/healing area. Very competitive.

asia_wellness.name: Wonderfruit
asia_wellness.notes: Referenced in existing outreach strategy. Dec/Jan dates.

timeline.6_months_before: Applications typically open for major festivals
timeline.3_months_before: Deadline for most festival artist submissions
timeline.1_month_before: Late applications sometimes accepted for workshop/healing areas

application_tips: Apply for healing/workshop areas first - less competitive than main stages
Emphasize unique angle: RAV Vast endorsed + vibroacoustic therapy software background
Include both performance AND workshop proposals
Use 'Who Is Flutur' video for journey narrative festivals
Mention Villa Porta sunset meditation residency as credential
Follow festival Instagram and engage BEFORE applying
applicationStrategy.key_positioning: From busking to Greece's Got Talent to 4-year sunset meditation residency - a journey of transformation through music
unique_selling_points: 4-year sunset meditation residency at Villa Porta
Live looping one-man show (cost-effective for festivals)
Software developer background in vibroacoustic therapy
Greece's Got Talent (4 YES votes) - entertainment credibility

actionItems: 1. VERIFY all contact emails before sending - this data needs web research validation
2. Check Waking Life website for 2026 artist applications (typically open Dec/Jan)
3. Monitor Boom Festival for 2026 Liminal Village applications
5. Research Pangonia and Evolve websites for current booking contacts
6. Follow all festival Instagram accounts and engage authentically
7. Join handpan/RAV community forums to find insider contacts
